name: chat
description: Chat with the Party Supply Assistant. Send a message and get a helpful response about party supplies, products, orders, and event planning.

prompt.description: The user's message or question about party supplies, orders, or event planning

sessionId.description: Optional session ID to maintain conversation context across multiple messages

userId.description: Optional customer ID. When set, the runtime loads the customer profile and last 10 interactions and injects them into the system prompt.

conversationHistory.description: Previous messages in the conversation for context

name: list_customers
description: List customers from the customer profile index for the UI's customer-selector type-ahead. Read-only call; does not invoke the AgentCore runtime.

action.description: Must be the literal string 'list_customers' (used by the Lambda to dispatch this call instead of the chat path). Note: the gateway schema validator rejects 'enum', so the value constraint is enforced at the Lambda layer, not by the schema.

limit.description: Maximum customers to return per call (max 500, default 500)

nextToken.description: Pagination token from a previous call's response

name: list_sessions
description: List recent chat sessions for an actor by querying AgentCore Memory. Returns one entry per session with the actor's first prompt, suitable for a 'recent conversations' sidebar.

action.description: Must be the literal string 'list_sessions' (Lambda dispatch). Value constraint enforced at Lambda layer.

actorId.description: The customer / user identifier whose sessions to list (e.g. CUST-100042)

sinceMs.description: Optional. Epoch ms lower bound for the session's most recent event (not createdAt) — a reused sessionId with fresh activity will still match. Defaults to 48 hours ago.

maxSessions.description: Optional. Max sessions to return after filtering (default 20, hard cap 100).

name: get_session_history
description: Fetch the user/assistant message timeline for a specific session, used by the UI when a customer clicks a past conversation to resume it. Backed by AgentCore Memory ListEvents.

action.description: Must be the literal string 'get_session_history' (Lambda dispatch). Value constraint enforced at Lambda layer.

sessionId.description: The session whose events to return

maxResults.description: Optional. Max events to return (default 50, hard cap 100).
